name: Vijfheerenlanden (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal logo and the name 'Gemeente Vijfheerenlanden'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Vijfheerenlanden in the province of Utrecht, formed in 2019 from Leerdam, Vianen and Zederik. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal logo and wordmark 'Gemeente Vijfheerenlanden'
